_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: User experience analysis involves advising on the approach to analysis, prioritisation and validation of user experience needs; recommend a range of techniques to analyse the user experience and ensure that it meets business and user needs; articulate and communicate how user experience needs affect the design of a system in a project or programme of work.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing segmentation analyses that produce actionable customer, product, or market groupings with clear business application and measurable differentiation.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.369), AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.357).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.554). Shared vocabulary: [business]. DDaT-only terms [advising, affect, analyse, analysis, approach, articulate] vs WIDAI-only terms [actionable, analyses, application, clear, customer, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.843 (P=0.839, R=0.848). Balanced P/R — the 56-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.5%). "User experience analysis involves advising on the approach to analysis, prioriti" and "Skill in designing and executing segmentation analyses that produce actionable c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.401 < STS 0.554 (gap -0.154). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [advising, affect, analyse] and [actionable, analyses, application] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.8%. Shared tokens: [business]. DDaT-only: [advising, affect, analyse, analysis, approach, articulate]. WIDAI-only: [actionable, analyses, application, clear, customer, designing].
